name: ai_marketing_skills
description: An open-source repository providing AI-powered marketing capabilities including growth experiments, sales pipeline management, content operations, outbound marketing, SEO, and finance automation.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Raw or processed marketing-related data such as campaign metrics, customer interactions, SEO keywords, sales records, and financial stats.

inputs.name: content_requests
inputs.description: Instructions or prompts for generating marketing content or communications.

inputs.name: sales_pipeline_info
inputs.description: Details about customer leads, stages in the sales funnel, and related sales metrics.

inputs.name: seo_keywords
inputs.description: Keywords and phrases for SEO analysis and content optimization.

inputs.name: finance_data
inputs.description: Financial data including budgets, forecasts, and transaction records for automation tasks.

outputs.name: growth_experiment_results
outputs.description: Insights and performance metrics from executed growth marketing experiments.

outputs.name: automated_content
outputs.description: Generated marketing content such as emails, blog posts, outbound messages, or SEO-optimized text.

outputs.name: sales_pipeline_status
outputs.description: Updated and analyzed sales funnel data reflecting pipeline health and opportunity prioritization.

outputs.name: seo_analysis_report
outputs.description: Analysis and recommendations on SEO strategy including keyword rankings and content suggestions.

outputs.name: automated_finance_reports
outputs.description: Financial summaries and automated reports for budget, forecasting, and expenditure tracking.

steps: Collect and preprocess marketing, sales, SEO, and finance data inputs
Apply AI models to generate growth experiment plans and perform analysis
Generate marketing and outbound content based on requested templates and input prompts
Analyze sales pipeline data to update status and identify opportunities
Conduct SEO analysis to generate keyword and content optimization reports
Aggregate results and insights for review and action
use_cases: Running AI-assisted marketing growth experiments to optimize campaigns
Generating automated outbound emails, blog content, and sales messages
Managing and analyzing sales pipeline to increase conversion efficiency
Improving SEO strategy with automated keyword research and content suggestions
Automating finance reports and budgeting tasks in marketing operations
patterns: AI-driven content generation for marketing and sales
Automation of repetitive marketing and finance tasks
Data-driven growth experiment planning and analysis
Integration of sales pipeline analytics for improved funnel management
SEO keyword optimization and performance tracking

prompt_templates.name: generate_outbound_email
prompt_templates.template: Create an outbound sales email targeting {target_audience} that highlights {product_features} and includes a call to action.

prompt_templates.name: seo_content_optimization
prompt_templates.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using keywords: {seo_keywords}. Content: {content_text}

prompt_templates.name: growth_experiment_plan
prompt_templates.template: Design a growth experiment focusing on {growth_goal} with metrics to track: {metrics_list}.

prompt_templates.name: sales_pipeline_analysis
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the sales pipeline data and provide insights on {focus_area} for better opportunity management.

prompt_templates.name: finance_report_automation
prompt_templates.template: Generate a finance report summarizing budget, expenditures, and forecast for the period: {time_period}.
